questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在將其應用程式和資料庫遷移到 AWS 雲端。該公司將使用 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS)、AWS Direct Connect 和 Amazon RDS。哪些活動將由公司的營運團隊管理？ （選擇三項。）
question_text.en: A company is migrating its applications and databases to the AWS Cloud. The company will use Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS), AWS Direct Connect, and Amazon RDS. Which activities will be managed by the company's operational team? (Choose three.)

A.zh: Amazon RDS 基礎架構層、作業系統和平臺的管理
A.en: Management of the Amazon RDS infrastructure layer, operating system, and platforms

B.zh: 建立 Amazon RDS 資料庫執行個體並設定計畫維護時段
B.en: Creation of an Amazon RDS DB instance and configuring the scheduled maintenance window

C.zh: 在 Amazon ECS 上設定其他軟體元件，用於監控、修補程式管理、日誌管理和主機入侵偵測
C.en: Configuration of additional software components on Amazon ECS for monitoring, patch management, log management, and host intrusion detection

D.zh: 為 Amazon RDS 的所有次要和主要資料庫版本安裝補丁
D.en: Installation of patches for all minor and major database versions for Amazon RDS

E.zh: 確保資料中心內 Amazon RDS 基礎架構的實體安全
E.en: Ensure the physical security of the Amazon RDS infrastructure in the data center

F.zh: 將透過 Direct Connect 傳輸的資料加密
F.en: Encryption of the data that moves in transit through Direct Connect

A.zh: 錯誤。。根據AWS的責任共擔模型，Amazon RDS的基礎設施層、作業系統和平臺都由AWS管理，使用者不需要管理這些部分。
A.en: Incorrect. . According to AWS's Shared Responsibility Model, Amazon RDS's infrastructure layer, operating system, and platform are managed by AWS, and users do not need to manage these parts.

B.zh: 正確。建立 Amazon RDS 資料庫執行個體並配置計畫維護時段是使用者的操作責任。
B.en: Correct. It is the user's operational responsibility to create an Amazon RDS database instance and configure scheduled maintenance windows.

C.zh: 正確。使用者需要在 Amazon ECS 上設定其他軟體元件，例如監控、修補程式管理、日誌管理和主機入侵偵測，這些都是使用者的責任。
C.en: Correct. Users need to configure additional software components on Amazon ECS, such as monitoring, patch management, log management, and host intrusion detection, which are the user's responsibility.

D.zh: 錯誤。Amazon RDS 管理其底層基礎設施的修補程式。客戶配置維護首選項和引擎升級，但無需自行安裝每個次要和主要資料庫修補程式。
D.en: Incorrect. Amazon RDS manages patches for its underlying infrastructure. Customers configure maintenance preferences and engine upgrades, but do not install every minor and major database patch themselves.

E.zh: 錯誤。。 AWS負責資料中心的管理和安全，使用者不需要管理這些部分。
E.en: Incorrect. . AWS is responsible for the management and security of the data center, and users do not need to manage these parts.

F.zh: 正確。使用者有責任將透過 Direct Connect 傳輸的資料進行加密。
F.en: Correct. It is the user's responsibility to encrypt the data in transmission via Direct Connect.

answer_text.zh: B. 建立 Amazon RDS 資料庫執行個體並設定計畫維護時段；C. 在 Amazon ECS 上設定其他軟體元件，用於監控、修補程式管理、日誌管理和主機入侵偵測；F. 將透過 Direct Connect 傳輸的資料加密
answer_text.en: B. Creation of an Amazon RDS DB instance and configuring the scheduled maintenance window; C. Configuration of additional software components on Amazon ECS for monitoring, patch management, log management, and host intrusion detection; F. Encryption of the data that moves in transit through Direct Connect

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：BCF (98%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：建立 Amazon RDS 資料庫執行個體並配置計畫維護時段是使用者的操作責任。；使用者需要在 Amazon ECS 上設定其他軟體元件，例如監控、修補程式管理、日誌管理和主機入侵偵測，這些都是使用者的責任。；使用者有責任將透過 Direct Connect 傳輸的資料進行加密。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BCF (98%). Popular discussion and key point summary: It is the user's operational responsibility to create an Amazon RDS database instance and configure scheduled maintenance windows.; Users need to configure additional software components on Amazon ECS, such as monitoring, patch management, log management, and host intrusion detection, which are the user's responsibility.; It is the user's responsibility to encrypt the data in transmission via Direct Connect.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行基於 Java 的作業。此作業每小時運行一次，運行時間為 10 秒。此作業會依照排程的時間間隔運作並消耗 1 GB 記憶體。除了作業使用最大可用 CPU 的短暫激增之外，執行個體的 CPU 使用率較低。該公司希望優化這項工作的成本。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs a Java-based job on an Amazon EC2 instance. The job runs every hour and takes 10 seconds to run. The job runs on a scheduled interval and consumes 1 GB of memory. The CPU utilization of the instance is low except for short surges during which the job uses the maximum CPU available. The company wants to optimize the costs to run the job. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 AWS App2Container (A2C) 將作業進行容器化。在具有 0.5 個虛擬 CPU (vCPU) 和 1 GB 記憶體的 AWS Fargate 上將作業作為 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 任務運行。
A.en: Use AWS App2Container (A2C) to containerize the job. Run the job as an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) task on AWS Fargate with 0.5 virtual CPU (vCPU) and 1 GB of memory.

B.zh: 將程式碼複製到具有 1 GB 記憶體的 AWS Lambda 函數中。建立 Amazon EventBridge 計畫規則以每小時執行程式碼。
B.en: Copy the code into an AWS Lambda function that has 1 GB of memory. Create an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule to run the code each hour.

C.zh: 使用 AWS App2Container (A2C) 將作業進行容器化。在現有的 Amazon 系統映像 (AMI) 中安裝容器。確保計劃在任務完成時停止容器。
C.en: Use AWS App2Container (A2C) to containerize the job. Install the container in the existing Amazon Machine Image (AMI). Ensure that the schedule stops the container when the task finishes.

D.zh: 設定現有計畫以在作業完成時停止 EC2 實例，並在下一個作業開始時重新啟動 EC2 執行個體。
D.en: Configure the existing schedule to stop the EC2 instance at the completion of the job and restart the EC2 instance when the next job starts.

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS Fargate 是一種無伺服器容器運作服務，適合執行容器化任務。但對於只需要 10 秒即可運行的任務，使用 Fargate 可能會導致額外的啟動時間和成本。錯誤原因：雖然任務可以運行，但Fargate的成本優化相比AWS Lambda並不理想，任務啟動時間可能會更長。
A.en: Incorrect. AWS Fargate is a serverless container running service, suitable for running containerized tasks. But for a task that only takes 10 seconds to run, using Fargate may result in additional startup time and cost. Reason for the error: Although the task can be run, Fargate's cost optimization is not ideal compared to AWS Lambda, and the task startup time may be longer.

B.zh: 正確。AWS Lambda 是一種無伺服器運算服務，適合執行短期任務。結合Amazon EventBridge，可以輕鬆實現定時任務排程。 Lambda啟動時間極短，按使用時間計費。非常適合運行10秒的任務，並且成本最低。
B.en: Correct. AWS Lambda is a serverless computing service, suitable for running short-term tasks. Combined with Amazon EventBridge, scheduled task scheduling can be easily implemented. Lambda has extremely short start-up time and is billed based on usage time. It is very suitable for running 10-second tasks and has the lowest cost.

C.zh: 錯誤。將任務容器化並安裝到現有 AMI 中可以運行任務，但需要額外的管理和調度工作。錯誤原因：與AWS Lambda相比，此方法更加複雜，無法達到最佳的成本最佳化。
C.en: Incorrect. Containerizing and installing tasks into an existing AMI can run tasks, but requires additional management and scheduling work. Reason for the error: Compared with AWS Lambda, this method is more complex and cannot achieve the best cost optimization.

D.zh: 錯誤。透過停止和啟動 EC2 執行個體可以節省一些成本，但需要額外的管理工作。錯誤原因：EC2執行個體啟動時間長，管理起來非常複雜。它們不如直接運行任務的 AWS Lambda 高效。
D.en: Incorrect. Some cost savings can be achieved by stopping and starting EC2 instances, but additional management work is required. Reason for the error: EC2 instances take a long time to start and are highly complex to manage. They are not as efficient as AWS Lambda running tasks directly.

answer_text.zh: B. 將程式碼複製到具有 1 GB 記憶體的 AWS Lambda 函數中。建立 Amazon EventBridge 計畫規則以每小時執行程式碼。
answer_text.en: B. Copy the code into an AWS Lambda function that has 1 GB of memory. Create an Amazon EventBridge scheduled rule to run the code each hour.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Lambda 是一種無伺服器運算服務，適合執行短期任務。結合Amazon EventBridge，可以輕鬆實現定時任務排程。 Lambda啟動時間極短，按使用時間計費。非常適合運行10秒的任務，並且成本最低。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Lambda is a serverless computing service, suitable for running short-term tasks. Combined with Amazon EventBridge, scheduled task scheduling can be easily implemented. Lambda has extremely short start-up time and is billed based on usage time. It is very suitable for running 10-second tasks and has the lowest cost.

questions.domain: 領域 1：設計彈性架構 (Design Resilient Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司想要為 Amazon EC2 資料和多個 Amazon S3 儲存桶實施備份策略。由於法規要求，公司必須將備份文件保留特定時間段。在保留期內，公司不得更改文件。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company wants to implement a backup strategy for Amazon EC2 data and multiple Amazon S3 buckets. Because of regulatory requirements, the company must retain backup files for a specific time period. The company must not alter the files for the duration of the retention period. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 AWS Backup 建立在治理模式下具有保管庫鎖的備份保管庫。建立所需的備份計畫。
A.en: Use AWS Backup to create a backup vault that has a vault lock in governance mode. Create the required backup plan.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon Data Lifecycle Manager 建立所需的自動快照原則。
B.en: Use Amazon Data Lifecycle Manager to create the required automated snapshot policy.

C.zh: 使用 Amazon S3 檔案閘道建立備份。配置適當的 S3 生命週期管理。
C.en: Use Amazon S3 File Gateway to create the backup. Configure the appropriate S3 Lifecycle management.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Backup 建立在合規模式下具有保管庫鎖的備份保管庫。建立所需的備份計畫。
D.en: Use AWS Backup to create a backup vault that has a vault lock in compliance mode. Create the required backup plan.

A.zh: 錯誤。治理模式允許使用者在鎖定後以特定權限修改或刪除備份檔案。因為題目要求「文件不得更改」，管理模式不符合要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Governance Mode allows users to modify or delete backup files with specific permissions after being locked. Because the question requires "the file must not be changed", the management model does not meet the requirements.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon Data Lifecycle Manager主要用於管理EC2執行個體的快照生命週期，但無法滿足S3資料的備份需求。此外，它不提供文件不可變的能力。
B.en: Incorrect. Amazon Data Lifecycle Manager is mainly used to manage the snapshot life cycle of EC2 instances, but it cannot meet the backup needs of S3 data. Additionally, it does not provide the ability for files to be immutable.

C.zh: 錯誤。Amazon S3 檔案閘道主要用於將本機檔案儲存到S3，但不提供不可變更的備份檔案的功能。題目要求「文件不能被改變」，這個選項不能滿足要求。
C.en: Incorrect. Amazon S3 File Gateway is mainly used to store local files to S3, but it does not provide the function of backing up files unchangeable. The question requires "the file must not be changed", and this option cannot meet the requirement.

D.zh: 正確。合規模式確保備份檔案被鎖定後無法修改或刪除，完全滿足問題的要求。 AWS Backup支援EC2和S3的備份，可以滿足問題中兩種資源的備份需求。因此這個選項是正確的。
D.en: Correct. Compliance Mode ensures that the backup file cannot be modified or deleted after being locked, which fully meets the requirements of the question. AWS Backup supports the backup of EC2 and S3, which can meet the backup requirements of the two resources in the question. Therefore this option is correct.

answer_text.zh: D. 使用 AWS Backup 建立在合規模式下具有保管庫鎖的備份保管庫。建立所需的備份計畫。
answer_text.en: D. Use AWS Backup to create a backup vault that has a vault lock in compliance mode. Create the required backup plan.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：D (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：合規模式確保備份檔案被鎖定後無法修改或刪除，完全滿足問題的要求。 AWS Backup支援EC2和S3的備份，可以滿足問題中兩種資源的備份需求。因此這個選項是正確的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: D (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Compliance Mode ensures that the backup file cannot be modified or deleted after being locked, which fully meets the requirements of the question. AWS Backup supports the backup of EC2 and S3, which can meet the backup requirements of the two resources in the question. Therefore this option is correct.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司擁有跨多個 AWS 區域和帳戶的資源。新聘用的解決方案架構師發現以前的員工沒有提供有關資源庫存的詳細資訊。解決方案架構師需要建立和映射所有帳戶中各種工作負載的關係詳細資訊。哪一種解決方案能夠以最高效的方式滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company has resources across multiple AWS Regions and accounts. A newly hired solutions architect discovers a previous employee did not provide details about the resources inventory. The solutions architect needs to build and map the relationship details of the various workloads across all accounts. Which solution will meet these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way?

A.zh: 使用 AWS Systems Manager Inventory 從詳細視圖報表產生地圖視圖。
A.en: Use AWS Systems Manager Inventory to generate a map view from the detailed view report.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Step Functions 收集工作負載詳細資料。手動建立工作負載的架構圖。
B.en: Use AWS Step Functions to collect workload details. Build architecture diagrams of the workloads manually.

C.zh: 使用 AWS 上的工作負載發現產生工作負載的架構圖。
C.en: Use Workload Discovery on AWS to generate architecture diagrams of the workloads.

D.zh: 使用 AWS X-Ray 查看工作負載詳細資訊。建構具有關係的架構圖。
D.en: Use AWS X-Ray to view the workload details. Build architecture diagrams with relationships.

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS Systems Manager Inventory 主要用於收集和管理執行個體及其關聯資源的詳細信息，但不具備直接產生架構圖或跨帳戶、跨區域資源關係圖的功能。
A.en: Incorrect. AWS Systems Manager Inventory is mainly used to collect and manage detailed information about instances and their associated resources, but it does not have the function of directly generating architecture diagrams or cross-account and cross-region resource relationship diagrams.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS Step Functions 是用於建置工作流程的編排服務。雖然它可以用來收集工作負載信息，但手動建立架構圖效率低下，並且不能滿足問題所要求的「操作上最高效」的解決方案。
B.en: Incorrect. AWS Step Functions is an orchestration service for building workflows. Although it can be used to collect workload information, manually building architecture diagrams is inefficient and does not meet the "most operationally efficient" solution required by the question.

C.zh: 正確。AWS 上的 Workload Discovery 是可以自動發現資源並產生架構圖的工具。支援跨帳戶、跨地域的資源關係映射，非常適合題目的要求。
C.en: Correct. Workload Discovery on AWS is a tool that can automatically discover resources and generate architecture diagrams. It supports cross-account and cross-region resource relationship mapping, which is very suitable for the requirements of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。AWS X-Ray 主要用於分散式應用程式的效能分析和跟蹤，不適合產生跨帳戶、跨區域的架構圖。
D.en: Incorrect. AWS X-Ray is mainly used for performance analysis and tracking of distributed application programs, and is not suitable for generating cross-account and cross-region architecture diagrams.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用 AWS 上的工作負載發現產生工作負載的架構圖。
answer_text.en: C. Use Workload Discovery on AWS to generate architecture diagrams of the workloads.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (97%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS 上的 Workload Discovery 是可以自動發現資源並產生架構圖的工具。支援跨帳戶、跨地域的資源關係映射，非常適合題目的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (97%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Workload Discovery on AWS is a tool that can automatically discover resources and generate architecture diagrams. It supports cross-account and cross-region resource relationship mapping, which is very suitable for the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations。該公司希望以不同的預算來營運其一些 AWS 帳戶。該公司希望在特定時間段內達到分配的預算閾值時接收警報並自動阻止在 AWS 帳戶上配置額外資源。哪種解決方案組合可以滿足這些要求？ （選擇三項。）
question_text.en: A company uses AWS Organizations. The company wants to operate some of its AWS accounts with different budgets. The company wants to receive alerts and automatically prevent provisioning of additional resources on AWS accounts when the allocated budget threshold is met during a specific period. Which combination of solutions will meet these requirements? (Choose three.)

A.zh: 使用 AWS 預算建立預算。在所需 AWS 帳戶的成本和使用情況報告部分下設定預算金額。
A.en: Use AWS Budgets to create a budget. Set the budget amount under the Cost and Usage Reports section of the required AWS accounts.

B.zh: 使用 AWS 預算建立預算。在所需 AWS 帳戶的帳單儀錶板下方設定預算金額。
B.en: Use AWS Budgets to create a budget. Set the budget amount under the Billing dashboards of the required AWS accounts.

C.zh: 為 AWS Budgets 建立 IAM 使用者以使用所需權限執行預算操作。
C.en: Create an IAM user for AWS Budgets to run budget actions with the required permissions.

D.zh: 為 AWS Budgets 建立 IAM 角色，以使用所需權限執行預算操作。
D.en: Create an IAM role for AWS Budgets to run budget actions with the required permissions.

E.zh: 新增警報，以便在每個帳戶達到其預算閾值時通知公司。新增預算操作，選擇使用適當的配置規則建立的 IAM 身份，以防止配置額外資源。
E.en: Add an alert to notify the company when each account meets its budget threshold. Add a budget action that selects the IAM identity created with the appropriate config rule to prevent provisioning of additional resources.

F.zh: 新增警報，以便在每個帳戶達到其預算閾值時通知公司。新增預算操作，選擇使用適當的服務控制策略 (SCP) 建立的 IAM 身份，以防止配置額外資源。
F.en: Add an alert to notify the company when each account meets its budget threshold. Add a budget action that selects the IAM identity created with the appropriate service control policy (SCP) to prevent provisioning of additional resources.

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS Budgets 的預算設定不在「成本和使用情況報告」部分，而是在帳單儀錶板中。該選項的描述不準確。
A.en: Incorrect. The budget setting of AWS Budgets is not in the "Cost and Usage Reports" section, but in the Billing Dashboard. This option is described inaccurately.

B.zh: 正確。AWS 預算的預算建立和設定是在帳單控制面板中完成的，且此選項的描述正確。
B.en: Correct. Budget creation and setup for AWS Budgets is done in the Billing Dashboard and this option is described correctly.

C.zh: 錯誤。AWS Budgets 通常使用 IAM 角色而不是 IAM 使用者來執行預算操作。 IAM角色更適合跨帳戶或服務的權限管理。
C.en: Incorrect. AWS Budgets typically uses IAM roles rather than IAM users to perform budget operations. IAM roles are more suitable for permission management across accounts or services.

D.zh: 正確。AWS Budgets 需要 IAM 角色來執行預算操作，例如觸發警報或限制資源建立。該選項的描述正確。
D.en: Correct. AWS Budgets requires an IAM role to perform budget operations, such as triggering alerts or limiting resource creation. This option is described correctly.

E.zh: 錯誤。預算操作通常使用 SCP（服務控制策略）來限制資源創建，而不是透過設定規則。該選項的描述不準確。
E.en: Incorrect. Budget operations typically use SCP (Service Control Policy) to limit resource creation rather than through Config rules. This option is described inaccurately.

F.zh: 正確。SCP 是 AWS Organizations 中的一個有效工具，用於限制帳戶行為、防止資源建立超出預算。該選項的描述正確。
F.en: Correct. SCP is an effective tool in AWS Organizations for limiting account behavior, preventing resource creation beyond budget. This option is described correctly.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 AWS 預算建立預算。在所需 AWS 帳戶的帳單儀錶板下方設定預算金額。；D. 為 AWS Budgets 建立 IAM 角色，以使用所需權限執行預算操作。；F. 新增警報，以便在每個帳戶達到其預算閾值時通知公司。新增預算操作，選擇使用適當的服務控制策略 (SCP) 建立的 IAM 身份，以防止配置額外資源。
answer_text.en: B. Use AWS Budgets to create a budget. Set the budget amount under the Billing dashboards of the required AWS accounts.; D. Create an IAM role for AWS Budgets to run budget actions with the required permissions.; F. Add an alert to notify the company when each account meets its budget threshold. Add a budget action that selects the IAM identity created with the appropriate service control policy (SCP) to prevent provisioning of additional resources.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：BDF (71%)； ADF (15%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS 預算的預算建立和設定是在帳單控制面板中完成的，且此選項的描述正確。；AWS Budgets 需要 IAM 角色來執行預算操作，例如觸發警報或限制資源建立。該選項的描述正確。；SCP 是 AWS Organizations 中的一個有效工具，用於限制帳戶行為、防止資源建立超出預算。該選項的描述正確。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BDF (71%); ADF (15%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Budget creation and setup for AWS Budgets is done in the Billing Dashboard and this option is described correctly.; AWS Budgets requires an IAM role to perform budget operations, such as triggering alerts or limiting resource creation. This option is described correctly.; SCP is an effective tool in AWS Organizations for limiting account behavior, preventing resource creation beyond budget. This option is described correctly.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司在一個 AWS 區域的 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行應用程式。該公司希望將 EC2 執行個體備份到第二個區域。該公司還希望在第二個區域配置 EC2 資源，並從一個 AWS 帳戶集中管理 EC2 執行個體。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company runs applications on Amazon EC2 instances in one AWS Region. The company wants to back up the EC2 instances to a second Region. The company also wants to provision EC2 resources in the second Region and manage the EC2 instances centrally from one AWS account. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 建立一個災難復原 (DR) 計劃，該計劃在第二個區域中具有相似數量的 EC2 執行個體。配置資料複製。
A.en: Create a disaster recovery (DR) plan that has a similar number of EC2 instances in the second Region. Configure data replication.

B.zh: 建立 EC2 執行個體的時間點 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 快照。定期將快照複製到第二個區域。
B.en: Create point-in-time Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) snapshots of the EC2 instances. Copy the snapshots to the second Region periodically.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Backup 建立備份計畫。為 EC2 執行個體配置到第二個區域的跨區域備份。
C.en: Create a backup plan by using AWS Backup. Configure cross-Region backup to the second Region for the EC2 instances.

D.zh: 在第二個區域部署類似數量的 EC2 執行個體。使用 AWS DataSync 將資料從來源區域傳輸到第二個區域。
D.en: Deploy a similar number of EC2 instances in the second Region. Use AWS DataSync to transfer the data from the source Region to the second Region.

A.zh: 錯誤。在第二個區域中使用類似數量的 EC2 執行個體建立災難復原 (DR) 計畫。配置資料複製。錯誤：由於需要持續運行額外的 EC2 實例，直接在第二個區域部署類似數量的 EC2 執行個體並配置資料複製會產生大量成本。不符合「最具成本效益」的要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Create a disaster recovery (DR) plan with a similar number of EC2 instances in a second region. Configuration data replication. Error: Deploying a similar number of EC2 instances directly in a second region and configuring data replication would incur significant costs due to the need to continuously run additional EC2 instances. Does not meet the "most cost effective" requirement.

B.zh: 錯誤。建立 EC2 執行個體的 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 快照。定期將快照複製到第二個區域。正確：EBS快照可以提供時間點備份並支援跨區域複製。但這種方法需要手動管理快照複製，缺乏自動化和輸出管理功能。雖然成本較低，但不如AWS Backup的解決方案完整。
B.en: Incorrect. Create an Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) snapshot of an EC2 instance. Periodically copy snapshots to the second region. Correct: EBS snapshots can provide point-in-time backup and support cross-region replication. However, this method requires manual management of snapshot replication and lacks automation and output management functions. Although the cost is lower, it is not as complete as AWS Backup's solution.

C.zh: 正確。使用 AWS Backup 建立備份計畫。配置 EC2 執行個體到第二個區域的跨區域備份。正確：AWS Backup 支援自動備份計劃，並且可以設定跨區域備份。提供輸出管理功能，滿足「最具成本效益」的要求。這是最好的解決方案。
C.en: Correct. Use AWS Backup to create a backup plan. Configure cross-region backup for EC2 instances to a second region. Correct: AWS Backup supports automated backup plans and can configure cross-region backups. Provides output management functions to meet the "most cost-effective" requirements. This is the best solution.

D.zh: 錯誤。此選項錯誤：AWS DataSync 主要用於檔案資料傳輸，而不是 EC2 執行個體的備份。此外，部署類似數量的 EC2 執行個體會產生大量成本，且無法滿足「最具成本效益」的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Deploy a similar number of EC2 instances in the second region. Use AWS DataSync to transfer data from the source region to the second region. Wrong: AWS DataSync is primarily used for file data transfer, not backup of EC2 instances. Additionally, deploying a similar number of EC2 instances would incur significant costs and would not meet the "most cost-effective" requirement.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用 AWS Backup 建立備份計畫。為 EC2 執行個體配置到第二個區域的跨區域備份。
answer_text.en: C. Create a backup plan by using AWS Backup. Configure cross-Region backup to the second Region for the EC2 instances.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (63%)； B (25%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：使用 AWS Backup 建立備份計畫。配置 EC2 執行個體到第二個區域的跨區域備份。正確：AWS Backup 支援自動備份計劃，並且可以設定跨區域備份。提供輸出管理功能，滿足「最具成本效益」的要求。這是最好的解決方案。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (63%); B (25%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Use AWS Backup to create a backup plan. Configure cross-region backup for EC2 instances to a second region. Correct: AWS Backup supports automated backup plans and can configure cross-region backups. Provides output management functions to meet the "most cost-effective" requirements. This is the best solution.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家使用 AWS 的公司正在建立一個應用程式來將資料傳輸給產品製造商。該公司擁有自己的身分提供者 (IdP)。該公司希望 IdP 在用戶使用應用程式傳輸資料時對應用程式使用者進行身份驗證。公司必須使用適用性聲明 2 (AS2) 協議。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company that uses AWS is building an application to transfer data to a product manufacturer. The company has its own identity provider (IdP). The company wants the IdP to authenticate application users while the users use the application to transfer data. The company must use Applicability Statement 2 (AS2) protocol. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 AWS DataSync 傳輸資料。建立用於 IdP 驗證的 AWS Lambda 函數。
A.en: Use AWS DataSync to transfer the data. Create an AWS Lambda function for IdP authentication.

B.zh: 使用 Amazon AppFlow 串流傳輸資料。建立用於 IdP 驗證的 Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) 任務。
B.en: Use Amazon AppFlow flows to transfer the data. Create an Amazon Elastic Container Service (Amazon ECS) task for IdP authentication.

C.zh: 使用 AWS Transfer Family 傳輸資料。建立用於 IdP 驗證的 AWS Lambda 函數。
C.en: Use AWS Transfer Family to transfer the data. Create an AWS Lambda function for IdP authentication.

D.zh: 使用 AWS Storage Gateway 傳輸資料。建立用於 IdP 驗證的 Amazon Cognito 身分池。
D.en: Use AWS Storage Gateway to transfer the data. Create an Amazon Cognito identity pool for IdP authentication.

A.zh: 錯誤。原因：AWS DataSync主要用於在不同儲存系統之間高效傳輸數據，但不支援AS2協議，無法直接與IdP通訊進行身份認證。
A.en: Incorrect. Reason: AWS DataSync is mainly used to efficiently transfer data between different storage systems, but it does not support the AS2 protocol and cannot directly communicate with IdP for identity authentication.

B.zh: 錯誤。原因：Amazon AppFlow 用於自動化 AWS 服務和 SaaS 應用程式之間的資料流，但它不支援 AS2 協定。此外，ECS 任務並不是處理 IdP 身分證的最佳選擇。
B.en: Incorrect. Reason: Amazon AppFlow is used to automate data stream between AWS services and SaaS applications, but it does not support the AS2 protocol. Additionally, ECS tasks are not the best choice for handling IdP identity cards.

C.zh: 正確。原因：AWS Transfer Family 支援 AS2 協議，可用於安全資料傳輸。 AWS Lambda可以透過公司IdP的輸入實現身分認證。
C.en: Correct. Reason: AWS Transfer Family supports the AS2 protocol and can be used for secure data transmission. AWS Lambda can realize identity authentication with the input of the company's IdP.

D.zh: 錯誤。原因：AWS Storage Gateway 主要用於混合雲端儲存解決方案，不支援 AS2 協定。另外，Amazon Cognito雖然可以用於身分認證，但不符合AS2協議的要求。
D.en: Incorrect. Reason: AWS Storage Gateway is mainly used for hybrid cloud storage solutions and does not support the AS2 protocol. In addition, although Amazon Cognito can be used for identity authentication, it does not match the requirements of the AS2 protocol.

answer_text.zh: C. 使用 AWS Transfer Family 傳輸資料。建立用於 IdP 驗證的 AWS Lambda 函數。
answer_text.en: C. Use AWS Transfer Family to transfer the data. Create an AWS Lambda function for IdP authentication.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (91%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：原因：AWS Transfer Family 支援 AS2 協議，可用於安全資料傳輸。 AWS Lambda可以透過公司IdP的輸入實現身分認證。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (91%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Reason: AWS Transfer Family supports the AS2 protocol and can be used for secure data transmission. AWS Lambda can realize identity authentication with the input of the company's IdP.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 解決方案架構師正在 Amazon API Gateway 中設計 RESTAPI 以實現現金回報服務。該應用程式需要 1 GB 記憶體和 2 GB 儲存空間用於其計算資源。應用程式將要求資料採用關係格式。哪一種額外的 AWS 服務組合能夠以最少的管理工作滿足這些要求？ （選兩個。）
question_text.en: A solutions architect is designing a RESTAPI in Amazon API Gateway for a cash payback service. The application requires 1 GB of memory and 2 GB of storage for its computation resources. The application will require that the data is in a relational format. Which additional combination ofAWS services will meet these requirements with the LEAST administrative effort? (Choose two.)

A.zh: 亞馬遜 EC2
A.en: Amazon EC2

B.zh: AWS Lambda
B.en: AWS Lambda

C.zh: 亞馬遜 RDS
C.en: Amazon RDS

D.zh: 亞馬遜 DynamoDB
D.en: Amazon DynamoDB

E.zh: Amazon Elastic Kubernetes 服務 (Amazon EKS)

A.zh: 錯誤。可以提供運算資源和存儲，但需要人工管理作業系統、資料庫安裝和維護，增加了管理複雜度，不符合「最少管理工作量」的要求。因此出現了錯誤。
A.en: Incorrect. can provide computing resources and storage, but requires manual management of the operating system, database installation and maintenance, which increases management complexity and does not meet the requirements of "minimum management effort". Hence the error.

B.zh: 正確。是一種無伺服器運算服務，支援API網關集成，但Lambda函數的記憶體限制為10GB，並且不直接提供持久性儲存。雖然滿足了運算需求，但無法滿足儲存需求。因此出現了錯誤。
B.en: Correct. is a serverless computing service that supports API Gateway integration, but the memory limit of Lambda functions is 10 GB and does not directly provide persistent storage. Although it meets the computing needs, it cannot meet the storage needs. Hence the error.

C.zh: 正確。是一種託管關係型資料庫服務，支援用於儲存資料的關聯格式並且需要較少的管理工作。符合題目要求，因此正確。
C.en: Correct. is a managed relational database service that supports relational formats for storing data and requires less management effort. It meets the question requirements and is therefore correct.

D.zh: 錯誤。是託管 NoSQL 資料庫服務，不支援關聯式資料儲存格式，因此發生錯誤。
D.en: Incorrect. is a managed NoSQL database service and does not support relational data storage formats, hence the error.

E.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EKS 可以運行容器化應用程序，但需要管理容器編排和存儲，這增加了管理複雜性，不滿足「最少管理工作量」的要求。因此出現了錯誤。
E.en: Incorrect. Amazon EKS can run containerized applications, but it needs to manage container orchestration and storage, which increases management complexity and does not meet the requirements of "minimum management effort". Hence the error.

answer_text.zh: B. AWS Lambda；C. 亞馬遜 RDS
answer_text.en: B. AWS Lambda; C. Amazon RDS

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：BC (89%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：是一種無伺服器運算服務，支援API網關集成，但Lambda函數的記憶體限制為10GB，並且不直接提供持久性儲存。雖然滿足了運算需求，但無法滿足儲存需求。因此出現了錯誤。；是一種託管關係型資料庫服務，支援用於儲存資料的關聯格式並且需要較少的管理工作。符合題目要求，因此正確。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: BC (89%). Popular discussion and key point summary: is a serverless computing service that supports API Gateway integration, but the memory limit of Lambda functions is 10 GB and does not directly provide persistent storage. Although it meets the computing needs, it cannot meet the storage needs. Hence the error.; is a managed relational database service that supports relational formats for storing data and requires less management effort. It meets the question requirements and is therefore correct.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司使用 AWS Organizations 在多個 AWS 帳戶中執行工作負載。當公司建立標籤時，標記策略會將部門標籤新增至 AWS 資源。會計團隊需要確定 Amazon EC2 消耗的支出。會計團隊必須確定哪些部門負責成本，無論 AWS 帳戶為何。會計團隊可以存取組織內所有 AWS 帳戶的 AWS Cost Explorer，並且需要存取 Cost Explorer 中的所有報告。哪種解決方案以最高效的方式滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company uses AWS Organizations to run workloads within multiple AWS accounts. A tagging policy adds department tags to AWS resources when the company creates tags. An accounting team needs to determine spending on Amazon EC2 consumption. The accounting team must determine which departments are responsible for the costs regardless ofAWS account. The accounting team has access to AWS Cost Explorer for all AWS accounts within the organization and needs to access all reports from Cost Explorer. Which solution meets these requirements in the MOST operationally efficient way?

A.zh: 在組織管理帳戶計費控制臺中，啟動名為「部門」的使用者定義成本分配標籤。在 Cost Explorer 中建立一份成本報告，按標籤名稱分組，並按 EC2 進行篩選。
A.en: From the Organizations management account billing console, activate a user-defined cost allocation tag named department. Create one cost report in Cost Explorer grouping by tag name, and filter by EC2.

B.zh: 從組織管理帳戶計費控制臺中，啟動名為「部門」的 AWS 定義的成本分配標籤。在 Cost Explorer 中建立一份成本報告，按標籤名稱分組，並按 EC2 進行篩選。
B.en: From the Organizations management account billing console, activate an AWS-defined cost allocation tag named department. Create one cost report in Cost Explorer grouping by tag name, and filter by EC2.

C.zh: 在組織成員帳號計費控制臺中，啟動名為「部門」的使用者定義成本分配標籤。在 Cost Explorer 中建立一份成本報告，按標籤名稱分組，並按 EC2 進行篩選。
C.en: From the Organizations member account billing console, activate a user-defined cost allocation tag named department. Create one cost report in Cost Explorer grouping by the tag name, and filter by EC2.

D.zh: 從組織成員帳戶計費控制臺中，啟動名為「部門」的 AWS 定義的成本分配標籤。在 Cost Explorer 中建立一份成本報告，按標籤名稱分組，並按 EC2 進行篩選。
D.en: From the Organizations member account billing console, activate an AWS-defined cost allocation tag named department. Create one cost report in Cost Explorer grouping by tag name, and filter by EC2.

A.zh: 正確。從組織管理帳戶的計費控制臺中，啟動名為「部門」的使用者定義成本分配標籤。在 Cost Explorer 中建立成本報告，按標籤名稱分組並針對 EC2 進行篩選。管理帳戶可以集中管理所有會員帳戶的費用分配。使用者可以根據需要自訂成本分配標準，例如「部門」。 Cost Explorer 支援按類型將資源類型（例如 EC2）分組和篩選。
A.en: Correct. From the Billing Console of the Organizations management account, activate a user-defined cost allocation tag named department. Create a cost report in Cost Explorer, group by tag name, and filter for EC2. The management account can centrally manage the cost allocation of all member accounts. User-defined cost allocation criteria can be customized as needed, such as "department". Cost Explorer supports grouping and filtering resource types (such as EC2) by type.

B.zh: 錯誤。從組織管理帳戶的計費控制臺中，啟動名為「部門」的 AWS 定義的成本分配標籤。在 Cost Explorer 中建立成本報告，按標籤名稱分組並針對 EC2 進行篩選。錯誤：AWS 定義的成本分配標籤是由 AWS 預先定義的，並且沒有自訂「部門」標籤。管理帳戶可以集中管理成本分配指標。 Cost Explorer 支援按類型將資源類型（例如 EC2）分組和篩選。
B.en: Incorrect. From the Billing console of the Organizations management account, activate an AWS-defined cost allocation tag named department. Create a cost report in Cost Explorer, group by tag name, and filter for EC2. Error: The cost allocation label defined by AWS is predefined by AWS, and there is no custom "department" label. Management accounts allow centralized management of cost allocation indicators. Cost Explorer supports grouping and filtering resource types (such as EC2) by type.

C.zh: 錯誤。從組織成員帳戶的計費控制臺中，啟動名為「部門」的使用者定義成本分配標籤。在 Cost Explorer 中建立成本報告，按標籤名稱分組並針對 EC2 進行篩選。錯誤：會員帳戶沒有條帶來集中管理所有帳戶的成本分配。使用者可以根據需要自訂成本分配標準，例如「部門」。 Cost Explorer 支援按類型將資源類型（例如 EC2）分組和篩選。
C.en: Incorrect. From the Billing Console of the Organizations member account, activate a user-defined cost allocation tag named department. Create a cost report in Cost Explorer, group by tag name, and filter for EC2. Error: Member accounts have no stripes to centrally manage the cost allocation of all accounts. User-defined cost allocation criteria can be customized as needed, such as "department". Cost Explorer supports grouping and filtering resource types (such as EC2) by type.

D.zh: 錯誤。從組織成員帳戶的計費控制臺中，啟動名為「部門」的 AWS 定義的成本分配標籤。在 Cost Explorer 中建立成本報告，按標籤名稱分組並針對 EC2 進行篩選。錯誤：會員帳戶沒有條帶來集中管理所有帳戶的成本分配。錯誤：AWS 定義的成本分配標籤是由 AWS 預先定義的，並且沒有自訂「部門」標籤。 Cost Explorer 支援按類型將資源類型（例如 EC2）分組和篩選。
D.en: Incorrect. From the Billing Console of the Organizations member account, activate an AWS-defined cost allocation tag named department. Create a cost report in Cost Explorer, group by tag name, and filter for EC2. Error: Member accounts have no stripes to centrally manage the cost allocation of all accounts. Error: The cost allocation label defined by AWS is predefined by AWS, and there is no custom "department" label. Cost Explorer supports grouping and filtering resource types (such as EC2) by type.

answer_text.zh: A. 在組織管理帳戶計費控制臺中，啟動名為「部門」的使用者定義成本分配標籤。在 Cost Explorer 中建立一份成本報告，按標籤名稱分組，並按 EC2 進行篩選。
answer_text.en: A. From the Organizations management account billing console, activate a user-defined cost allocation tag named department. Create one cost report in Cost Explorer grouping by tag name, and filter by EC2.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：從組織管理帳戶的計費控制臺中，啟動名為「部門」的使用者定義成本分配標籤。在 Cost Explorer 中建立成本報告，按標籤名稱分組並針對 EC2 進行篩選。管理帳戶可以集中管理所有會員帳戶的費用分配。使用者可以根據需要自訂成本分配標準，例如「部門」。 Cost Explorer 支援按類型將資源類型（例如 EC2）分組和篩選。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: From the Billing Console of the Organizations management account, activate a user-defined cost allocation tag named department. Create a cost report in Cost Explorer, group by tag name, and filter for EC2. The management account can centrally manage the cost allocation of all member accounts. User-defined cost allocation criteria can be customized as needed, such as "department". Cost Explorer supports grouping and filtering resource types (such as EC2) by type.

questions.domain: 領域 3：設計安全架構 (Design Secure Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司希望在其軟體即服務 (SaaS) 應用程式 Salesforce 帳戶和 Amazon S3 之間安全地交換資料。公司必須使用 AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) 客戶管理金鑰 (CMK) 加密靜態資料。公司還必須對傳輸中的資料進行加密。該公司已為 Salesforce 帳戶啟用 API 存取。
question_text.en: A company wants to securely exchange data between its software as a service (SaaS) application Salesforce account and Amazon S3. The company must encrypt the data at rest by using AWS Key Management Service (AWS KMS) customer managed keys (CMKs). The company must also encrypt the data in transit. The company has enabled API access for the Salesforce account.

A.zh: 建立 AWS Lambda 函數以將資料從 Salesforce 安全地傳輸到 Amazon S3。
A.en: Create AWS Lambda functions to transfer the data securely from Salesforce to Amazon S3.

B.zh: 建立 AWS Step Functions 工作流程。定義將資料從 Salesforce 安全傳輸到 Amazon S3 的任務。
B.en: Create an AWS Step Functions workflow. Define the task to transfer the data securely from Salesforce to Amazon S3.

C.zh: 建立 Amazon AppFlow 流以將資料從 Salesforce 安全地傳輸到 Amazon S3。
C.en: Create Amazon AppFlow flows to transfer the data securely from Salesforce to Amazon S3.

D.zh: 為 Salesforce 建立自訂連接器，以將資料安全地從 Salesforce 傳輸到 Amazon S3。
D.en: Create a custom connector for Salesforce to transfer the data securely from Salesforce to Amazon S3.

A.zh: 錯誤。雖然 AWS Lambda 可用於處理資料傳輸，但它需要額外的開發工作來實作 Salesforce 的輸入並確保資料在傳輸和預存程序中加密。這不是最直接的解決方案。
A.en: Incorrect. While AWS Lambda can be used to handle data transfers, it requires additional development work to implement input to Salesforce and ensure data is encrypted in transit and storage. This is not the most straightforward solution.

B.zh: 錯誤。AWS Step Functions 主要用於編排工作流程，不直接處理資料傳輸。它需要整合其他服務（例如Lambda）來實現資料傳輸，這增加了複雜性。
B.en: Incorrect. AWS Step Functions is mainly used to orchestrate workflows and does not directly handle data transmission. It requires the integration of other services (such as Lambda) to implement data transfer, which increases complexity.

C.zh: 正確。Amazon AppFlow 是一項專門用於安全匯入和傳輸資料的服務。它支援Salesforce原生輸入，並在傳輸和預存程序中自動處理資料加密，滿足問題的要求。
C.en: Correct. Amazon AppFlow is a service specifically designed to securely import and transmit data. It supports native input with Salesforce and automatically handles data encryption during transmission and storage, meeting the requirements of the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。建立自訂連接器需要額外的開發工作，並且可能無法直接滿足資料加密要求。這不是最佳解決方案。
D.en: Incorrect. Creating custom connectors requires additional development work and may not directly meet data encryption requirements. This is not the optimal solution.

answer_text.zh: C. 建立 Amazon AppFlow 流以將資料從 Salesforce 安全地傳輸到 Amazon S3。
answer_text.en: C. Create Amazon AppFlow flows to transfer the data securely from Salesforce to Amazon S3.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon AppFlow 是一項專門用於安全匯入和傳輸資料的服務。它支援Salesforce原生輸入，並在傳輸和預存程序中自動處理資料加密，滿足問題的要求。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon AppFlow is a service specifically designed to securely import and transmit data. It supports native input with Salesforce and automatically handles data encryption during transmission and storage, meeting the requirements of the question.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在單一 AWS 區域中開發行動遊戲應用程式。該應用程式在 Auto Scaling 群組中的多個 Amazon EC2 執行個體上執行。該公司將應用程式資料儲存在 Amazon DynamoDB 中。該應用程式透過使用用戶和伺服器之間的 TCP 流量和 UDP 流量進行通訊。該應用程式將在全球範圍內使用。該公司希望確保所有用戶的延遲盡可能最低。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is developing a mobile gaming app in a single AWS Region. The app runs on multiple Amazon EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group. The company stores the app data in Amazon DynamoDB. The app communicates by using TCP traffic and UDP traffic between the users and the servers. The application will be used globally. The company wants to ensure the lowest possible latency for all users. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 使用 AWS Global Accelerator 建立加速器。在使用 Global Accelerator 整合並偵聽 TCP 和 UDP 連接埠的加速器端點後面建立應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB)。更新 Auto Scaling 群組以在 ALB 上註冊執行個體。
A.en: Use AWS Global Accelerator to create an accelerator. Create an Application Load Balancer (ALB) behind an accelerator endpoint that uses Global Accelerator integration and listening on the TCP and UDP ports. Update the Auto Scaling group to register instances on the ALB.

B.zh: 使用 AWS Global Accelerator 建立加速器。在使用全域加速器整合並偵聽 TCP 和 UDP 連接埠的加速器端點後面建立網路負載平衡器 (NLB)。更新 Auto Scaling 群組以在 NLB 上註冊執行個體。
B.en: Use AWS Global Accelerator to create an accelerator. Create a Network Load Balancer (NLB) behind an accelerator endpoint that uses Global Accelerator integration and listening on the TCP and UDP ports. Update the Auto Scaling group to register instances on the NLB.

C.zh: 建立 Amazon CloudFront 內容傳遞網路 (CDN) 終端節點。在端點後面建立網路負載平衡器 (NLB) 並偵聽 TCP 和 UDP 連接埠。更新 Auto Scaling 群組以在 NLB 上註冊執行個體。更新 CloudFront 以使用 NLB 作為來源。
C.en: Create an Amazon CloudFront content delivery network (CDN) endpoint. Create a Network Load Balancer (NLB) behind the endpoint and listening on the TCP and UDP ports. Update the Auto Scaling group to register instances on the NLB. Update CloudFront to use the NLB as the origin.

D.zh: 建立 Amazon CloudFront 內容傳遞網路 (CDN) 終端節點。在端點後面建立應用程式負載平衡器 (ALB) 並偵聽 TCP 和 UDP 連接埠。更新 Auto Scaling 群組以在 ALB 上註冊執行個體。更新 CloudFront 以使用 ALB 作為來源。
D.en: Create an Amazon CloudFront content delivery network (CDN) endpoint. Create an Application Load Balancer (ALB) behind the endpoint and listening on the TCP and UDP ports. Update the Auto Scaling group to register instances on the ALB. Update CloudFront to use the ALB as the origin.

A.zh: 錯誤。使用 AWS Global Accelerator 和 ALB：ALB 主要用於處理 HTTP/HTTPS 流量，不支援 UDP 流量。問題顯然需要支援TCP和UDP流量，所以ALB不符合要求。
A.en: Incorrect. Using AWS Global Accelerator and ALB: ALB is mainly used to process HTTP/HTTPS traffic and does not support UDP traffic. The question clearly requires support for TCP and UDP traffic, so ALB does not meet the requirements.

B.zh: 正確。使用 AWS Global Accelerator 和 NLB：NLB 支援 TCP 和 UDP 流量，滿足問題需求。 AWS Global Accelerator 可以優化全球用戶的存取路徑並減少延遲。這個選項是正確的。
B.en: Correct. Use AWS Global Accelerator and NLB: NLB supports TCP and UDP traffic, which meets the question requirements. AWS Global Accelerator can optimize access paths for global users and reduce latency. This option is correct.

C.zh: 錯誤。使用 CloudFront 和 NLB：CloudFront 主要用於內容分發 (CDN)，不適合處理即時 TCP 和 UDP 流量。 NLB 支援 TCP 和 UDP 流量，但 CloudFront 無法直接優化即時通訊的延遲。
C.en: Incorrect. Using CloudFront and NLB: CloudFront is mainly used for content distribution (CDN) and is not suitable for handling real-time TCP and UDP traffic. NLB supports TCP and UDP traffic, but CloudFront cannot directly optimize latency for real-time communications.

D.zh: 錯誤。使用CloudFront和ALB：ALB不支援UDP流量，無法滿足問題要求。 CloudFront 不適合處理即時 TCP 和 UDP 流量。
D.en: Incorrect. Using CloudFront and ALB: ALB does not support UDP traffic and cannot meet the question requirements. CloudFront is not suitable for handling real-time TCP and UDP traffic.

answer_text.zh: B. 使用 AWS Global Accelerator 建立加速器。在使用全域加速器整合並偵聽 TCP 和 UDP 連接埠的加速器端點後面建立網路負載平衡器 (NLB)。更新 Auto Scaling 群組以在 NLB 上註冊執行個體。
answer_text.en: B. Use AWS Global Accelerator to create an accelerator. Create a Network Load Balancer (NLB) behind an accelerator endpoint that uses Global Accelerator integration and listening on the TCP and UDP ports. Update the Auto Scaling group to register instances on the NLB.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：使用 AWS Global Accelerator 和 NLB：NLB 支援 TCP 和 UDP 流量，滿足問題需求。 AWS Global Accelerator 可以優化全球用戶的存取路徑並減少延遲。這個選項是正確的。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Use AWS Global Accelerator and NLB: NLB supports TCP and UDP traffic, which meets the question requirements. AWS Global Accelerator can optimize access paths for global users and reduce latency. This option is correct.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司有一個處理客戶訂單的應用程式。該公司將該應用程式託管在 Amazon EC2 執行個體上，該執行個體將訂單儲存到 Amazon Aurora 資料庫中。有時，當流量很高時，工作負載處理訂單的速度不夠快。解決方案架構師該如何做才能盡快將訂單可靠地寫入資料庫？
question_text.en: A company has an application that processes customer orders. The company hosts the application on an Amazon EC2 instance that saves the orders to an Amazon Aurora database. Occasionally when traffic is high the workload does not process orders fast enough. What should a solutions architect do to write the orders reliably to the database as quickly as possible?

A.zh: 當流量較高時增加 EC2 執行個體的執行個體大小。將訂單寫入 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)。將資料庫端點訂閱 SNS 主題。
A.en: Increase the instance size of the EC2 instance when traffic is high. Write orders to Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS). Subscribe the database endpoint to the SNS topic.

B.zh: 將訂單寫入 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 佇列。使用應用程式負載平衡器後面的 Auto Scaling 群組中的 EC2 執行個體從 SQS 佇列讀取資料並將訂單處理到資料庫中。
B.en: Write orders to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Use EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer to read from the SQS queue and process orders into the database.

C.zh: 將訂單寫入 Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS)。將資料庫端點訂閱 SNS 主題。使用 Application Load Balancer 後面的 Auto Scaling 群組中的 EC2 執行個體來讀取 SNS 主題。
C.en: Write orders to Amazon Simple Notification Service (Amazon SNS). Subscribe the database endpoint to the SNS topic. Use EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer to read from the SNS topic.

D.zh: 當 EC2 執行個體達到 CPU 門檻限制時，將訂單寫入 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 佇列。使用應用程式負載平衡器後面的 Auto Scaling 群組中的 EC2 執行個體的計劃擴充來從 SQS 佇列讀取資料並將訂單處理到資料庫中。
D.en: Write orders to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue when the EC2 instance reaches CPU threshold limits. Use scheduled scaling of EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer to read from the SQS queue and process orders into the database.

A.zh: 錯誤。增加 EC2 執行個體大小並使用 Amazon SNS：錯誤。雖然增加實例大小可以提高單一實例的處理能力，但這不是可擴展的解決方案。此外，Amazon SNS 是一種發布/訂閱服務，無法直接保證訊息的順序或可靠性，資料庫終端節點也無法直接訂閱 SNS 主題。
A.en: Incorrect. Increasing EC2 instance size and using Amazon SNS: Error. While increasing the instance size can increase the processing power of a single instance, it is not a scalable solution. In addition, Amazon SNS is a publish/subscribe service and cannot directly guarantee the order or reliability of messages, nor can database endpoints directly subscribe to SNS topics.

B.zh: 正確。使用 Amazon SQS 和 Auto Scaling：正確。 Amazon SQS 是一種可靠的訊息佇列服務，可緩衝訂單請求以確保訊息不會遺失。使用 Auto Scaling 群組和負載平衡器動態擴展 EC2 執行個體以處理高流量，確保訂單處理的可靠性和效率。
B.en: Correct. Using Amazon SQS and Auto Scaling: Correct. Amazon SQS is a reliable message queue service that buffers order requests to ensure messages are not lost. Use Auto Scaling groups and load balancers to dynamically scale EC2 instances to handle high traffic, ensuring order processing reliability and efficiency.

C.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon SNS 和 Auto Scaling：錯誤。 Amazon SNS 是一種發布/訂閱服務，不適合用作訊息佇列。它不保證訊息的順序或可靠性，且資料庫端點不能直接訂閱SNS主題。
C.en: Incorrect. Using Amazon SNS and Auto Scaling: Error. Amazon SNS is a publish/subscribe service and is not suitable for use as a message queue. It does not guarantee the order or reliability of messages, and database endpoints cannot directly subscribe to SNS topics.

D.zh: 錯誤。使用 Amazon SQS 和計劃擴充：錯誤。計劃的擴展是基於預定義的時間表，而不是即時流量變化。這種方法無法動態響應流量峰值，並且可能導致訂單處理延遲。
D.en: Incorrect. Using Amazon SQS and Schedule Scaling: Error. Planned scaling is based on predefined schedules rather than real-time traffic changes. This approach cannot dynamically respond to traffic spikes and can cause delays in order processing.

answer_text.zh: B. 將訂單寫入 Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) 佇列。使用應用程式負載平衡器後面的 Auto Scaling 群組中的 EC2 執行個體從 SQS 佇列讀取資料並將訂單處理到資料庫中。
answer_text.en: B. Write orders to an Amazon Simple Queue Service (Amazon SQS) queue. Use EC2 instances in an Auto Scaling group behind an Application Load Balancer to read from the SQS queue and process orders into the database.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：B (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：使用 Amazon SQS 和 Auto Scaling：正確。 Amazon SQS 是一種可靠的訊息佇列服務，可緩衝訂單請求以確保訊息不會遺失。使用 Auto Scaling 群組和負載平衡器動態擴展 EC2 執行個體以處理高流量，確保訂單處理的可靠性和效率。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: B (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Using Amazon SQS and Auto Scaling: Correct. Amazon SQS is a reliable message queue service that buffers order requests to ensure messages are not lost. Use Auto Scaling groups and load balancers to dynamically scale EC2 instances to handle high traffic, ensuring order processing reliability and efficiency.

questions.domain: 領域 4：設計成本優化架構 (Design Cost-Optimized Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家物聯網公司正在發布一款床墊，該床墊配有感測器來收集有關用戶睡眠的數據。感測器將資料傳送到 Amazon S3 儲存桶。感測器每晚為每個床墊收集約 2 MB 的數據。公司必須處理和匯總每個床墊的數據。結果需要儘快提供。資料處理需要 1 GB 內存，並將在 30 秒內完成。哪一種解決方案能夠最具成本效益地滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: An IoT company is releasing a mattress that has sensors to collect data about a user’s sleep. The sensors will send data to an Amazon S3 bucket. The sensors collect approximately 2 MB of data every night for each mattress. The company must process and summarize the data for each mattress. The results need to be available as soon as possible. Data processing will require 1 GB of memory and will finish within 30 seconds. Which solution will meet these requirements MOST cost-effectively?

A.zh: 將 AWS Glue 與 Scala 作業結合使用
A.en: Use AWS Glue with a Scala job

B.zh: 將 Amazon EMR 與 Apache Spark 腳本結合使用
B.en: Use Amazon EMR with an Apache Spark script

C.zh: 將 AWS Lambda 與 Python 腳本結合使用
C.en: Use AWS Lambda with a Python script

D.zh: 將 AWS Glue 與 PySpark 作業結合使用
D.en: Use AWS Glue with a PySpark job

A.zh: 錯誤。AWS Glue 是一種託管 ETL 服務，適用於大規模資料轉換任務，但啟動時間較長（通常為幾分鐘），不適合需要快速處理的任務。此外，使用 Scala 可能會增加開發複雜性，但該問題不需要特定的語言。
A.en: Incorrect. AWS Glue is a managed ETL service that is suitable for large-scale data transformation tasks, but it has a long startup time (usually several minutes) and is not suitable for tasks that require fast processing. Additionally, using Scala may increase development complexity, but the question does not require a specific language.

B.zh: 錯誤。Amazon EMR 是一種託管 Hadoop 和 Spark 叢集服務，適用於大規模分散式資料處理任務。然而，由於資料量為2MB，處理時間需求為30秒，EMR的成本和複雜度都太高，無法稱得上「最具性價比」。
B.en: Incorrect. Amazon EMR is a managed Hadoop and Spark cluster service suitable for large-scale distributed data processing tasks. However, with a data volume of 2 MB and a processing time requirement of 30 seconds, the cost and complexity of EMR were too high to qualify as "most cost-effective.".

C.zh: 正確。AWS Lambda 是一種無伺服器運算服務，支援 Python 腳本，可快速啟動和處理小規模資料任務。 Lambda 的最大記憶體限制為 10 GB，完全符合 1 GB 記憶體需求，其執行時間限制為 15 分鐘，遠遠超過 30 秒的要求。對於 2 MB 的數據，Lambda 的成本非常低，且不需要配置或管理基礎架構。
C.en: Correct. AWS Lambda is a serverless computing service that supports Python scripts and can quickly start and process small-scale data tasks. Lambda's maximum memory limit is 10 GB, which fully meets the 1 GB memory requirement, and its execution time is limited to 15 minutes, far exceeding the 30 second requirement. For 2 MB of data, Lambda is very low cost and requires no provisioning or management infrastructure.

D.zh: 錯誤。雖然 PySpark 是一種流行的分散式資料處理桶架，但 AWS Glue 啟動時間較長，不適合需要快速處理的任務。此外，Glue 通常比 Lambda 更昂貴，尤其是對於小規模資料處理任務。
D.en: Incorrect. While PySpark is a popular distributed data processing bucket rack, AWS Glue has a long startup time and is not suitable for tasks that require fast processing. Additionally, Glue is generally more expensive than Lambda, especially for small-scale data processing tasks.

answer_text.zh: C. 將 AWS Lambda 與 Python 腳本結合使用
answer_text.en: C. Use AWS Lambda with a Python script

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：AWS Lambda 是一種無伺服器運算服務，支援 Python 腳本，可快速啟動和處理小規模資料任務。 Lambda 的最大記憶體限制為 10 GB，完全符合 1 GB 記憶體需求，其執行時間限制為 15 分鐘，遠遠超過 30 秒的要求。對於 2 MB 的數據，Lambda 的成本非常低，且不需要配置或管理基礎架構。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: AWS Lambda is a serverless computing service that supports Python scripts and can quickly start and process small-scale data tasks. Lambda's maximum memory limit is 10 GB, which fully meets the 1 GB memory requirement, and its execution time is limited to 15 minutes, far exceeding the 30 second requirement. For 2 MB of data, Lambda is very low cost and requires no provisioning or management infrastructure.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司託管一個線上購物應用程序，該應用程式將所有訂單儲存在 Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL 單可用區資料庫實例中。管理層希望消除單點故障，並要求解決方案架構師推薦一種方法來最大限度地減少資料庫停機時間，而無需對應用程式程式碼進行任何更改。哪種解決方案滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company hosts an online shopping application that stores all orders in an Amazon RDS for PostgreSQL Single-AZ DB instance. Management wants to eliminate single points of failure and has asked a solutions architect to recommend an approach to minimize database downtime without requiring any changes to the application code. Which solution meets these requirements?

A.zh: 透過修改資料庫執行個體並指定多可用區選項，將現有資料庫執行個體轉換為多可用區部署。
A.en: Convert the existing database instance to a Multi-AZ deployment by modifying the database instance and specifying the Multi-AZ option.

B.zh: 建立新的 RDS 多重使用區部署。拍攝目前 RDS 執行個體的快照並使用該快照還原新的多可用區部署。
B.en: Create a new RDS Multi-AZ deployment. Take a snapshot of the current RDS instance and restore the new Multi-AZ deployment with the snapshot.

C.zh: 在另一個可用區中建立 PostgreSQL 資料庫的唯讀副本。使用 Amazon Route 53 加權記錄集在資料庫之間指派請求。
C.en: Create a read-only replica of the PostgreSQL database in another Availability Zone. Use Amazon Route 53 weighted record sets to distribute requests across the databases.

D.zh: 將 RDS for PostgreSQL 資料庫置於 Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling 群組中，群組大小至少為 2。使用 Amazon Route 53 加權記錄集跨執行個體指派請求。
D.en: Place the RDS for PostgreSQL database in an Amazon EC2 Auto Scaling group with a minimum group size of two. Use Amazon Route 53 weighted record sets to distribute requests across instances.

A.zh: 正確。Amazon RDS 支援透過修改現有資料庫執行個體來啟用多可用區部署。這種方法可以最大程度地減少停機時間，並且無需更改應用程式程式碼。滿足問題要求：消除單點故障，最大限度地減少資料庫停機時間，並且不需要更改應用程式代碼。
A.en: Correct. Amazon RDS supports enabling Multi-AZ deployments by modifying existing database instances. This approach minimizes downtime and requires no changes to application code. Meets the question requirements: Eliminates single points of failure, minimizes database downtime, and requires no changes to application code.

B.zh: 錯誤。雖然可以透過快照還原到新的多可用區部署，但此過程會導致大量停機，因為需要建立新執行個體並還原資料。不符合問題要求：資料庫停機時間無法最小化。
B.en: Incorrect. Although it is possible to restore to a new Multi-AZ deployment via snapshots, this process results in significant downtime as new instances need to be created and data restored. Does not meet the question requirements: Database downtime cannot be minimized.

C.zh: 錯誤。只讀副本不能用於寫入，因此無法完全消除單點故障。不符合題目要求：無法解決主資料庫的高可用問題。
C.en: Incorrect. Read replicas cannot be used for writes, so single points of failure cannot be completely eliminated. Does not meet the question requirements: Unable to solve the high availability problem of the main database.

D.zh: 錯誤。RDS 資料庫無法直接放置在 EC2 Auto Scaling 群組中。此選項與 RDS 的工作方式不一致。不符合題目要求：無法實現RDS的高可用。
D.en: Incorrect. RDS database cannot be placed directly in an EC2 Auto Scaling group. This option is inconsistent with how RDS works. Does not meet the question requirements: High availability of RDS cannot be achieved.

answer_text.zh: A. 透過修改資料庫執行個體並指定多可用區選項，將現有資料庫執行個體轉換為多可用區部署。
answer_text.en: A. Convert the existing database instance to a Multi-AZ deployment by modifying the database instance and specifying the Multi-AZ option.

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：A (100%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：Amazon RDS 支援透過修改現有資料庫執行個體來啟用多可用區部署。這種方法可以最大程度地減少停機時間，並且無需更改應用程式程式碼。滿足問題要求：消除單點故障，最大限度地減少資料庫停機時間，並且不需要更改應用程式代碼。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: A (100%). Popular discussion and key point summary: Amazon RDS supports enabling Multi-AZ deployments by modifying existing database instances. This approach minimizes downtime and requires no changes to application code. Meets the question requirements: Eliminates single points of failure, minimizes database downtime, and requires no changes to application code.

questions.domain: 領域 2：設計高性能架構 (Design High-Performing Architectures)

question_text.zh: 一家公司正在開發一款應用程式來支援客戶需求。該公司希望將該應用程式部署在同一可用區內的多個基於 Amazon EC2 Nitro 的執行個體上。該公司還希望使應用程式能夠同時寫入多個基於 EC2 Nitro 的執行個體中的多個區塊儲存卷，以實現更高的應用程式可用性。哪種解決方案可以滿足這些要求？
question_text.en: A company is developing an application to support customer demands. The company wants to deploy the application on multiple Amazon EC2 Nitro-based instances within the same Availability Zone. The company also wants to give the application the ability to write to multiple block storage volumes in multiple EC2 Nitro-based instances simultaneously to achieve higher application availability. Which solution will meet these requirements?

A.zh: 將通用 SSD (gp3) EBS 磁碟區與 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 多重附加結合使用
A.en: Use General Purpose SSD (gp3) EBS volumes with Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Multi-Attach

B.zh: 將吞吐量最佳化 HDD (st1) EBS 磁碟區與 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 多重附加結合使用
B.en: Use Throughput Optimized HDD (st1) EBS volumes with Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Multi-Attach

C.zh: 將預先配置 IOPS SSD (io2) EBS 磁碟區與 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 多重附加結合使用
C.en: Use Provisioned IOPS SSD (io2) EBS volumes with Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Multi-Attach

D.zh: 將通用 SSD (gp2) EBS 磁碟區與 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 多重附加結合使用
D.en: Use General Purpose SSD (gp2) EBS volumes with Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Multi-Attach

A.zh: 錯誤。雖然gp3是一個通用SSD卷，提供高效能和低成本，但它不支援EBS Multi-Attach功能。
A.en: Incorrect. Although gp3 is a general-purpose SSD volume that provides high performance and low cost, it does not support the EBS Multi-Attach function.

B.zh: 錯誤。st1 是吞吐量最佳化的 HDD 卷，適合大規模順序讀寫工作負載，但不支援 EBS 多重附加功能。
B.en: Incorrect. st1 is a throughput-optimized HDD volume suitable for large-scale sequential read and write workloads, but it does not support the EBS Multi-Attach feature.

C.zh: 正確。io2是高效能SSD卷，支援EBS Multi-Attach功能，允許多個EC2實例同時掛載同一個卷，滿足題目要求的高可用和多實例寫入能力。
C.en: Correct. io2 is a high-performance SSD volume that supports the EBS Multi-Attach function, allowing multiple EC2 instances to mount the same volume at the same time, meeting the high availability and multi-instance writing capabilities required by the question.

D.zh: 錯誤。gp2是通用SSD卷，但不支援EBS Multi-Attach功能。
D.en: Incorrect. gp2 is a general-purpose SSD volume, but it does not support the EBS Multi-Attach function.

answer_text.zh: C. 將預先配置 IOPS SSD (io2) EBS 磁碟區與 Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) 多重附加結合使用
answer_text.en: C. Use Provisioned IOPS SSD (io2) EBS volumes with Amazon Elastic Block Store (Amazon EBS) Multi-Attach

discussion.zh: 社群投票原始顯示：C (95%)。熱門討論與考點摘要：io2是高效能SSD卷，支援EBS Multi-Attach功能，允許多個EC2實例同時掛載同一個卷，滿足題目要求的高可用和多實例寫入能力。
discussion.en: Community vote as displayed: C (95%). Popular discussion and key point summary: io2 is a high-performance SSD volume that supports the EBS Multi-Attach function, allowing multiple EC2 instances to mount the same volume at the same time, meeting the high availability and multi-instance writing capabilities required by the question.
